stemHtml: The Flight Management System (FMS) is organised in such a way that the…

options.a: navigation database in the FMC is created by the pilot.
options.b: pilot cannot modify the navigation database once it is installed in the FMC.
options.c: navigation database in the FMC is valid for one year.
options.d: navigation database in the FMC is “read only”, but the pilot is able to add other navigational data.
